case_title: SHANTY GUPTA VS. YVETTE DANIELLE MARQUIS, DDS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUPTA, SHANTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUIS, DDS, YVETTE DANIELLE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL OFFICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUPTA, SHANTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARQUIS, DDS, YVETTE DANIELLE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL OFFICE $2,112.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,337.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
